name: Shared Whiteboard
description: Sketch together on a responsive meeting whiteboard with P2P sync, undo, erase, and PNG export.

en.name: Shared Whiteboard
en.description: Sketch together on a responsive meeting whiteboard with P2P sync, undo, erase, PNG export, and late-join recovery.

zh-CN.name: 共享白板
zh-CN.description: 适合会议协作的响应式共享白板，支持 P2P 笔迹同步、撤销、擦除、图片保存与后来者状态恢复。
